summary: Iteration 9 - Visor Finance App Invest Screen Holdings Feature Testing. Backend APIs 100% PASS (15/15 tests). Frontend Invest screen displays correctly with Indian Markets, Portfolio Overview with holdings integration, and My Holdings section visible. Add/CAS buttons exist but click handlers have React Native Web scroll context issues preventing automated interaction.

ui_bugs.issue: Buttons visible in full page screenshot but not consistently clickable via Playwright automation due to React Native Web scroll container context. Manual testing may be required to verify modal functionality.
ui_bugs.note: data-testid attributes may not be rendering to DOM in React Native Web

action_items: Verify Add Holding modal works via manual browser testing
Verify CAS Upload modal works via manual browser testing
critical_code_review_comments: Holdings data correctly integrates with Portfolio Overview - API confirmed
Category normalization (Stock vs Stocks) working correctly in backend
Live prices via yfinance working for holdings

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Core display works, button click automation has framework-specific issues

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up TEST_TCS holding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend holdings CRUD APIs fully tested and working. Frontend Invest screen shows: Indian Markets (5 items with live prices), Portfolio Overview (₹98.8K invested, ₹78.9K current), My Holdings (3 seeded holdings - Reliance, HDFC Bank, Axis Bluechip), Asset Allocation pie chart, Risk Profile section. Add and CAS buttons visible in full page view. React Native Web scroll handling makes automated button clicks challenging - recommend manual verification.

features_verified.GET /api/holdings/live: PASS - Returns holdings with live prices and summary
features_verified.GET /api/portfolio-overview: PASS - Returns portfolio with holdings integrated into categories
features_verified.GET /api/market-data: PASS - Returns 5 Indian market indices with live data
features_verified.Authentication required: PASS - All holdings endpoints return 401 without token
features_verified.frontend_indian_markets_section: PASS - Shows Nifty 50, SENSEX, Nifty Bank, Gold 10g, Silver 1kg with prices
features_verified.frontend_portfolio_overview: PASS - Shows Invested vs Current Value with category breakdown (Stock, SIP, Mutual Fund, PPF)
features_verified.frontend_holdings_section: PASS - Shows seeded holdings (Reliance, HDFC Bank, Axis Bluechip) with values
features_verified.frontend_holdings_add_btn: VISIBLE - Button exists but automation click requires manual verification
features_verified.frontend_holdings_cas_btn: VISIBLE - Button exists but automation click requires manual verification
features_verified.frontend_asset_allocation: PASS - Pie chart shows allocation breakdown
features_verified.frontend_risk_profile: PASS - Shows Moderate profile with Retake Assessment button
